title: poa sterilis
intro: Poa sterilis, also known as sterile meadow-grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Poa sterilis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal properties, and is often used in combination with other herbs for enhanced effects.
